_setup_instructions: 1. Deploy OpsBoard to Vercel: bash scripts/deploy-vercel.sh
3. Replace YOUR_VERCEL_URL below with your actual Vercel URL
4. In ChatGPT: open your Home AI Custom GPT → Configure → Actions → Create action
5. Paste this entire file (without _setup_instructions) as the schema

info.title: OpsBoard Signal API
info.description: Emit signals to OpsBoard from ChatGPT. Use this when you identify items that need the operator's attention, approval, or awareness.

servers.description: Replace YOUR_VERCEL_URL with your actual Vercel deployment URL

post.description: Send a signal when you identify something requiring the operator's attention, approval, or awareness. Use this for family scheduling, home maintenance, financial items, and anything that needs a decision or first look.

source_ai.description: Use HOME_AI for home and family matters. Use FINANCE_AI for financial items.

summary.description: One sentence explaining what needs attention and what action is needed

signal_kind.description: attention: needs review. approval: needs yes/no. blocked: cannot proceed. input: new item. progress: update. info: low priority.

human_action_needed.description: true for approvals and blocked items. false for info and progress.

workflow_id.description: Optional. Group related signals. Example: wf_school_term1_2026

approval_id.description: Optional. For approval signals requiring explicit decision tracking.

routing_hint.description: Optional. finance_review | dev_review | urgent | inbox | signal

source_ref.description: Optional. URL linking back to the source (email, calendar event, etc.)
